name: Cabbage Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large onion, chopped fine or grated
1 can tuna fish in oil, (1 to 2)
Enough mayonnaise to make salad moist
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the cabbage and onion finely.
2. Grate one or two pickles and one can of tuna fish into the mixture.
3. Add enough mayonnaise to keep the salad moist.
4. Before serving, crush a package of potato chips and stir it in.
5. Optionally, add sour cream and onion chips for extra flavor.
